posts.author: ShadowProwler92
posts.text: @TargetUser you're pathetic and nobody cares about your opinions! Come find me at the abandoned warehouse on 4th Street tonight, I'll show you who's boss. #Threat #Stalking [link removed]
posts.explanation: This post requires Escalation because it depicts a pattern of sustained unwanted contact combined with a specific threat to meet at a real location, which constitutes coordinated brigading and stalking rather than a one-off insult.
